segments.text: Give the king your justice, O God, and your righteousness to the royal son!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May he judge your people with righteousness, and your poor with justice!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the mountains bear prosperity for the people, and the hills, in righteousness!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May he defend the cause of the poor of the people, give deliverance to the children of the needy, and crush the oppressor!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May they fear you while the sun endures, and as long as the moon, throughout all generations!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May he be like rain that falls on the mown grass, like showers that water the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: In his days may the righteous flourish, and peace abound, till the moon be no more!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May he have dominion from sea to sea, and from the River to the ends of the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May desert tribes bow down before him, and his enemies lick the dust!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May the kings of Tarshish and of the coastlands render him tribute; may the kings of Sheba and Seba bring gifts!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May all kings fall down before him, all nations serve him!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For he delivers the needy when he calls, the poor and him who has no helper.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He has pity on the weak and the needy, and saves the lives of the needy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: From oppression and violence he redeems their life; and precious is their blood in his sight.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Long may he live; may gold of Sheba be given to him! May prayer be made for him continually, and blessings invoked for him all the day!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May there be abundance of grain in the land; on the tops of the mountains may it wave; may its fruit be like Lebanon; and may people blossom in the cities like the grass of the field!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May his name endure forever, his fame continue as long as the sun! May people be blessed in him, all nations call him blessed!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: shall be as a son to continue his father's name for ever

segments.text: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, who alone does wondrous things.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed be his glorious name forever; may the whole earth be filled with his glory! Amen and Amen!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The prayers of David, the son of Jesse, are ended.
